title: Kot Mumin Heat Wave
lead: Kot Mumin is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.69. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Kot Mumin has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 49% and wind speed is 3.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for the city's infrastructure and daily life.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
